title: Sri Lanka Is Caught in the Middle as Second Iranian Vessel Seeks Safe Haven
summary_full: A day after rescuing Iranian sailors from the wreckage of a warship sunk by a U.S. submarine, Sri Lanka’s neutrality is being tested.
summary_public: A day after rescuing Iranian sailors from the wreckage of a warship sunk by a U.S. submarine, Sri Lanka’s neutrality is being tested.

IR.label: neutral
